message:
feat: OPFS-backed hash join for TB-scale browser joins

- Add OPFSJoinExecutor: partitions tables to OPFS, joins partition-by-partition
- Add SQLExecutor.executeStream() for memory-efficient chunked reads
- Update _hashJoin to use OPFS instead of in-memory Map
- Only one partition in RAM at a time (64 hash partitions)
- Auto-cleanup temp files, track bytes written/read stats
- Demo page shows OPFS usage in network stats

+ + OPFS: 0 KB written +

orderByOnSubset: result.orderByOnSubset }; + // Update OPFS stats if join was used + if (result.opfsStats) { + Alpine.store('app').opfsWritten = result.opfsStats.bytesWrittenToOPFS || 0; + console.log('[Demo] OPFS Join Stats:', result.opfsStats); + } + Alpine.store('app').showResults = true; // CSS-driven: render via LanceData (events trigger Alpine updates) LanceData.render('#results-body', formattedResult);
